creator: mwm@mired.org
text:
Dirk Froemberg <dirk@FreeBSD.org> types:
> Seems to be a problem with 5.0-CURRENT, only.
> Please send the complete output of the build process.

Something change in the last four and a half months seems to have
fixed the problem on -CURRENT as well. At least, it's now installing
with no hackery on my part.

	<mike
